encounter.ancient_inheritance.title: Ancient Inheritance
encounter.ancient_inheritance.flavor: An ancient will awakens within you. Power from forgotten ages flows into your meridians.
encounter.hidden_cave.title: Hidden Cave
encounter.hidden_cave.flavor: Crystal veins glitter in the dark. You absorb their essence — gold and insight alike.
encounter.spirit_beast.title: Spirit Beast
encounter.spirit_beast.flavor: A spirit fox watches from the shadows… then chooses to walk beside you.
encounter.forgotten_memory.title: Forgotten Memory
encounter.forgotten_memory.flavor: A fragment of the past surfaces — a village consumed by void, a promise unkept.
encounter.ancient_sword.title: Ancient Sword
encounter.ancient_sword.flavor: A blade sleeps in stone. Your touch breaks the seal; it answers to your qi.
encounter.secret_manual.title: Secret Manual
encounter.secret_manual.flavor: Hidden pages flutter from the fallen foe — a flame technique you were never taught.
item.sword.ancient.name: Ancient Spirit Blade
item.sword.ancient.desc: Forged in an age before realms. Its edge hums with dormant dao.
